name: Chocolate Pudding Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a 3 3/4 to 4 oz package of regular pudding mix.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Blend in the eggs, milk, and vanilla extract.
4. Whisk together the flour, chocolate pudding mix, baking powder, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Stir in the chopped nuts.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for 25 to 30 minutes or until set.
9. Allow to cool completely.
10. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the top, if desired.
11. Cut into bars.
Makes 24 brownies.
